# Diego_RSV
RSV infection study. Lung tissue sections from neonatal and adult mice were analyzed using GeoMx and CosMx. The study includes non-infected, infected, infected + drug treatment, and reinfection groups. The goal is to identify differences in the immune response to RSV infection between neonatal and adult mice.
